title: dryopteris alatella
intro: Dryopteris alatella, also known as the Japanese wood fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dryopteris alatella include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Dryopteris alatella is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
